titleStmt.title: SII 18.65: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 65. (B.K. No. 156 of 1932-33.) MALLŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up near the temple of Basavaṇṇa in Survey No. 141.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Trailōkyamalladēva, is dated in Śaka 981, Vikāri, Śrāvaṇa śu. 2, Sunday. But for the week-day, the details correspond to A.D. 1059, July 14, which was a Wednesday. In the next year, however, i.e., A.D. 1060, Śrāvaṇa s11u. 2 fell on Sunday, July 2.

It states that Rājāditya of the Jimūtavāhana lineage and Khachara family who was the nārgāvuṇḍa of the division of Hundred-and-Forty (apparently Bāsavūr), having gone with his wife Paṁpādēvi, to Mallavura, made a gift of land and of taxes, for the tank of that place. Another grant of land for the same tank made by Mahālāḷasandhivigrahi, Manevergaḍe and Daṇḍanāyaka Guṇḍamayya is also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© pratkakṣavastuvisayāya jagaddhitāya visvasthitipraḷeyasaṁ
bhavakāraṇāya sarvvātmanē vijitakōpamanōbhavāya stubhyaṁ nama(ḥ)stri
bhuvanaprabhavē śivāya(ḥ) . svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahā
rājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇa śrīmatraiḷōkyamalladēvara vijayarājyamutta
rōttarābhivirddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salutta
mire . svasti samastavasumatītaḷakhyāta jīmūtavāhanānvaya
prasūta bandhujanakamaḷinīrājahaṁsa khacaravaṁsōttaṁsa padmā
vatīlabdavaraprasāda nnāmādisamastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmat
manneyaṁ rājādityarasarnnūṟanālvattarkkaṁ nārggāvuṇḍutanaṁgeye .
svastyanavarataparamakalyāṇābhyudayasahaśraphaḷabhōgabhāgini
dvitīyalakṣmīsavūneyarāśritajanakalpavrikṣarddānacintāmaṇi
śrīmatpaṁpādēviyaruṁ rājādityarasaruṁ mallavurakke bija
yaṁgeydu piriya keṟeyaṁ nnōḍi sakavarṣa 981 neya vikāri
saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa suddha 2 Ādityavāradandu dhārāpūrvvaka
diṁ keṟeyoḷagaṇa guyyalgaṁḍugamuṁ keṟeya nīrpparidu beḷevani
tu gaddeya manneya sāmyada teṟeymaṁ Āva kālakkaṁ sarvvabādhāparihā
ra . svasti samadhigatapañcamahāśabda mahāsāmantādhipati ma
hāpracaṇḍadaṇḍanāyaka vairibhayadāyaka maṁtrimāṇikya nīti
cāṇakya śrīmanmahālāḷasandhivigrahi maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ
guṇḍamayyaṁgaḷ keṟege biṭṭa koḍaṁgeyya gaṟde matta 1 tōṁṭaṁ baḷḷi 300 Ī dharmmamaṁ
pratipāḷisidavaru bāṇarāśiyoḷ pannicchāsira brāhmaṇargge pannicchāsira kavileyanubhaya mukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku Ī dharmmamanarasaraḷidaḍaṁ Arasu kādudaṁ gāvuṇḍa
ru keṟeya kelasakke goḍade tāvaḷidaḍaṁ bāṇarāsiyoḷ pannicchāsira kavileya
pannicchāsira brāhmaṇarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakku . slōka . sāmānyōyaṁ
dharmmasētuṁ nripāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁ bhāgina prārtthivēṁdrā
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harētu vasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvariśanahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . dīvara māḷaṁ
Digital edition of SII 18.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
